title: Effect Gems
description: A simple datapack that adds new gems that can be eqquiped in the off-hand or main-hand to receive effects.
body:
![Effect Gems Header](https://i.imgur.com/DfKqxti.png) **Effect Gems is a simple datapack that adds new items called “Effect Gems” that can be put in the offhand or mainhand slot to receive status effects.** ![Orange Gem](https://gamingbarn.net/images/download_page/ef/description/images/amber.png)| The gems can be obtained by killing a Gem Zombie. The Gem Zombie can spawn naturally throughout the world, anywhere a normal zombie can spawn. This means Gem Zombies can spawn from zombie spawners! ---|--- **There are a total of 12 different gems that the Gem Zombie can drop. Each one will grant a different effect when placed in the offhand slot. There is also the possibility that the Gem Zombie drops a pearl, too!**|![Purple Gem](https://gamingbarn.net/images/download_page/ef/description/images/amethyst.png) > [![SparkedHost Promotional Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d880ee51aed06a8b0de318249c81b079793a8a8.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2775) > Want a Minecraft server? Consider SparkedHost! Use code GAMINGBARN for 25% off! > [![Discord Promotional Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6dc9d56feee16e94cb60cccde0087803114ac61.jpeg)]([https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg](https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg)) >
***https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg***
> Need help with my datapacks? Found a bug? Want to share some feedback? Join my Discord server! There, I can offer personal help towards any problem you may be having!
